5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (src/lib/adminCommonSocket.ts, src/lib/alexaCustom.ts, ...). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.7.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.iot/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
